title: nephrodium aculeatum
intro: Nephrodium aculeatum, also known as the spiny shield fern, is a species of fern native to Africa and the Indian Ocean islands. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Nephrodium aculeatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and some studies suggest that it may also have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties when used in various herbal preparations.
